title: glow-lab-skincare
brief: Glow Lab is a clean clinical skincare brand. Glass bottles, serums and moisturizers. Bright airy studio lighting, white and cream backgrounds, diverse skin tones, dewy skin close-ups. Minimal, modern, science-meets-beauty aesthetic.

clips.prompt: Close-up of woman's face applying serum drops to cheek with glass dropper, dewy glowing skin, soft studio lighting, natural makeup, editorial beauty photography
Woman applying moisturizer to bare shoulder and collarbone, glowing hydrated skin, bright airy backlight, intimate body care moment, editorial lifestyle photography

Woman's hands cupping glass serum bottle close-up, soft even lighting, clean nails, white surface, product hero moment, minimal editorial photography
